message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for bloom, ring_buffer, count_min_sketch, backpressure_severity, distributed

Add arb strategies for BloomStats, RingBufferStats, CmsStats,
DistributedConfig/TlsConfig/AuthMode. Add behavioral tests for
ContinuousBackpressure reset/config/observation tracking. Fix
fibonacci_heap.rs missing semicolon. Each file expanded from 30 to 37-40.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
